nl_query: Show all leaf questions in the Algorithms paper that have no rubric defined in the approved answer key.
failed_sql: SELECT q.id, q.code, q.path, q.max_marks, q.display_order FROM question q JOIN question_paper qp ON qp.id = q.qp_id WHERE qp.id = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM answer_key ak WHERE ak.qp_id = q.qp_id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED') AND q.max_marks IS NOT NULL ORDER BY q.path;
